title: System Info Report
description: Enhance the system info logger to include more details and save in a structured format.
problemStatement:
Enhance the system info logger from Lesson 5. Instead of appending plain text, create a JSON file `system-info.json` that stores an array of reports. Each report should be an object with `timestamp`, `platform`, `arch`, `cpuCount`, `totalMemoryGB`, `freeMemoryGB`, and `uptime` (in hours). Each time you run the script, it should read the existing JSON (if any), append the new report, and write it back. If the file doesn't exist, start with an empty array.

**Bonus:** Use `fs.readFile` and `fs.writeFile` asynchronously, and handle errors properly.
hints: Use `fs.readFile` to read the existing JSON. If file not found, treat as empty array.
Use `JSON.stringify` with pretty formatting (2 spaces) before writing.
Make sure to handle errors in each step.
expectedOutput: A file `system-info.json` with an array of reports.
